creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
xorg-server-21.1.8_2,1 is working for me on 12.4/stable amd64.  Only tested so far on a system that is using x11/nvidia-driver.  Empty xorg.conf

From Xorg.0.log ...

[2502113.209] (II) Loading /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/extensions/libglx.so
[2502113.210] (II) Loading /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/nvidia_drv.so
[2502113.232] (II) Loading sub module "fb"
[2502113.232] (II) Loading sub module "wfb"
[2502113.232] (II) Loading /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/libwfb.so
[2502113.232] (II) Loading sub module "ramdac"
[2502113.301] (II) Loading sub module "glxserver_nvidia"
[2502113.301] (II) Loading /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/extensions/libglxserver_nvidia.so
[2502121.928] (II) Loading sub module "dri2"
[2502125.172] (II) Loading /usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/input/libinput_drv.so


I have not tried 21.1.8_2,1 on systems with any other video cards yet.
